rationale: The cited paper is used for more than a generic literature list: Danaher cites Lambrecht and Tucker (2013) to support a key motivation that common microtargeting practices can over-target consumers who would buy anyway. That claim directly frames why the paper proposes a model-based optimal microtargeting approach instead of heuristic targeting. The citation is not used for method transfer, but it meaningfully informs the problem setup and contribution positioning.
relation_description: Danaher uses Lambrecht and Tucker (2013) as prior empirical grounding that retargeting/targeting can be misallocated toward already likely buyers, motivating the need for optimization at the individual level. The cited study functions as background evidence underpinning the paper's framing of limitations in existing targeting practice.
